trust.notes: Imported from the upstream README, CONTRIBUTING.md, BUILDING.md, CODEOWNERS, GitHub security overview, and `.go-version`. `repo.build` and `repo.test` follow the documented Terraform CLI/Core development environment. The repo-wide CODEOWNERS default identifies `@hashicorp/terraform-core`, while narrower subtree owners are intentionally not expanded into top-level maintainers. Acceptance tests are optional and external-service-dependent, so `repo.test` stays on the self-contained unit-test suite. Not maintainer-verified.

repo.name: Terraform
repo.description: Terraform is a tool for building, changing, and versioning infrastructure safely and efficiently. Terraform can manage existing and popular service providers as well as custom in-house solutions.
